purpose: Decide when characters/<id>/past.yaml can be included in Academy 1198 scene_contract.

allowed_triggers.description: The scene explicitly enters a flashback or memory sequence.
A character with valid loaded knowledge says or asks about a past fact in-scene.
The scene goal explicitly says to process a past event, confession, old school incident, document, trauma, or memory.
A meaningful object/place/date directly connected to past.yaml is active and noticed.
Current calendar day marks a past-related beat as active now.
Existing character/session memory has an open hook pointing to a past event and current scene touches it.

not_valid_triggers: relationship tension exists but no past fact is surfaced
ordinary inventory words such as documents, phone, bag, notebook
hidden-bond or future canon is known to the project but not to the scene

load_modes.none: past.yaml is not included; hidden facts go to forbidden_context if risky.
load_modes.narrow_slice: Only the relevant past block is included with exact trigger and who knows it.
load_modes.full_past: Allowed only for explicit flashback/author-debug/context-audit, not normal scene generation.

required_when_loaded: visible_knowledge_boundaries must state who knows and who does not know the past fact
forbidden_context must list related facts still unavailable
